summary: Iteration 44: Tested email sending (Resend) and SDI (Aruba) integration features. All backend API endpoints working correctly. Frontend Email/SDI buttons present in editors. Fixed 1 bug in InvoiceEditorPage.

bugs_fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: SDI button used undefined 'invoice' variable instead of 'formData'. This caused the page to crash when accessing a saved invoice.

invoices_page_dropdown.email_button: PASS - 'Invia via Email' visible in dropdown menu
invoices_page_dropdown.sdi_button: PASS - 'Invia a SDI' visible only for 'Emessa' status invoices (correct behavior)

invoice_editor_page.email_button: PASS - Email button visible in toolbar
invoice_editor_page.sdi_button: PASS - SDI button visible in toolbar (after fix)

preventivo_editor_page.email_button: PASS - Email button visible for existing preventivi

ddt_editor_page.email_button: PASS - Email button visible for existing DDTs

api_responses_verified.Email tracking fields: Verified - email_sent, email_sent_to, email_sent_at populated after successful send

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test client cli_d1e771d63ae8 and invoice inv_282d3b506a11
context_for_next_testing_agent: Email sending features via Resend API fully working. SDI features validate correctly (SDI keys empty). Invoice/DDT/Preventivo editors all have Email buttons. InvoiceEditorPage bug fixed. Test with session_token=test_session_3fd8f142365c4bca985f687e996cd67c.
